name: cbdMD Inc. 8.0% Series A Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock
summary: cbdMD Inc. 8.0% Series A Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock is a publicly traded company specializing in cannabidiol (CBD) products. The company offers a wide array of CBD-infused goods, including tinctures, topicals, capsules, and pet products. cbdMD is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
